name: Rahul Banerjee
text: Best interior designers in Kolkata! Transparent pricing, no hidden costs. Our modular kitchen looks absolutely stunning. The soft-close cabinets and quartz countertop are premium quality.

name: Anita Das
text: Professional team, excellent execution. They understood exactly what we wanted and delivered beyond expectations. The 3D design helped us visualize everything before work started.

name: Subhajit Roy
text: Very happy with the false ceiling and wardrobe work. Clean execution, no mess, completed in exactly the time promised. Will definitely hire again for our second flat.

name: Moumita Ghosh
text: Sankalp gave us our dream home within our budget. The team was courteous, punctual, and the quality of materials used was excellent. 5 stars without any hesitation!

name: Arjun Mukherjee
text: Hired Sankalp for our office renovation. The result is stunning. Our clients are always impressed when they visit. Professional approach and great attention to detail.
